## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guide](https://github.com/zoharbabin/google-researcher-mcp/blob/main/docs/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] I added tests for new functionality (if applicable)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors (`npm run build`)
- [ ] I updated documentation for user-facing changes (if applicable)
- [ ] I added a changelog entry under `[Unreleased]` in `docs/CHANGELOG.md` (if applicable)
- [ ] My changes do not introduce security vulnerabilities (no hardcoded secrets, no unsanitized user input, no new dependencies with known CVEs)
- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
